extraction.one_line_summary: HERSHEY Marc attacked 1km out on final Code Echedorf ramps, exploited Quintana's visible weakness and isolated race leader Almeida to steal yellow by 4 seconds.
tactical_patterns: Turgis went 10.5km out but failed; successful move came inside 1km when peloton hit steepest ramps after attrition.
UAE burned Almeida's entire team on chase, leaving him isolated for critical final kilometer where he couldn't respond.
Formolo appeared to pace-make for Hershey before attack, suggesting pre-planned UAE internal hierarchy favored young rider over Almeida.

rider_signals.HERSHEY Marc: positive: attacked precisely when Quintana showed visible front-wheel weaving on steep ramps, demonstrating opportunistic race-reading ability beyond typical young rider
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: front wheel weaved visibly on 12-13% ramps that previously suited him, clear signal of diminished climbing power on steep gradients
rider_signals.ALMEIDA Pedro: negative: team completely exhausted before final kilometer despite holding yellow, poor resource management left him defenseless when attacks came
rider_signals.TURGIS Anthony: neutral: 10.5km attack gained 30 seconds but caught; confirms these short climbs require sub-1km moves to succeed
rider_signals.FORMOLO Davide: neutral: appeared to pace for Hershey despite Almeida in yellow, revealing UAE prioritized young rider jersey over protecting existing lead
